title: syrmatium prostratum
intro: Syrmatium prostratum, also known as the climbing syrmatium, is a type of flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant's health benefits include its potential to treat kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and reduce blood pressure. Syrmatium prostratum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
